xx0xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx 0000000000001111000 # IE=0 (during fetch)
0x10000110111111111 0011100000000111000 # jnz opd (Taken)
1x10000110111111111 0000000000001111000 # jnz opd (Skip)
1x10000111011111111 0011100000000111000 # jz opd (Taken)
0x10000111011111111 0000000000001111000 # jz opd (Skip)
x010000111111111111 0011100000000111000 # jns opd (Taken)
x110000111111111111 0000000000001111000 # jns opd (Skip)
x110001000011111111 0011100000000111000 # js opd (Taken)
x010001000011111111 0000000000001111000 # js opd (Skip)
xx10001000111111111 0011100000000111000 # jmp opd
xx10000100001110001 0000100000001111011 # mov [a], b
xx10000100001110001 0000100000001111101 # mov [opd], b
xx10001001111111111 1000000000001111000 # hlt
xx10001010011111111 0000000000001111000 # nop
# --- ÄZÅpüEś_ŚØēēÄZ (add, sub, mul, and, or, xor, div) ---
# reg-reg
xx10000000000000000 0000010000000000000 # add a, a
xx10000000000000001 0000010010000000000 # add a, b
xx10000000000000010 0000010100000000000 # add a, c

xx10000000000001111 0000011110000000000 # add a, opd
xx10000000000011111 0000111110000001000 # add b, opd
xx10000000000101111 0001011110000010000 # add c, opd
xx10000000000111111 0001111110000011000 # add d, opd

xx10000000001011111 0010111110000101000 # add bp, opd
xx10000000001101111 0011011110000110000 # add sp, opd
xx10000000100001111 0000011110010000000 # sub a, opd
xx10000000100011111 0000111110010001000 # sub b, opd
xx10000000100101111 0001011110010010000 # sub c, opd
xx10000000100111111 0001111110010011000 # sub d, opd

xx10000001000011111 0000111110100001000 # mul b, opd
xx10000001000101111 0001011110100010000 # mul c, opd
xx10000001000111111 0001111110100011000 # mul d, opd

xx10000001001011111 0010111110100101000 # mul bp, opd
xx10000001001101111 0011011110100110000 # mul sp, opd

xx10000001100011111 0000111110110001000 # and b, opd

# reg-[a]
xx10000000000000111 0100010000000000010 # add a, [a]
xx10000000000010111 0100010010000001010 # add b, [a]
xx10000000000100111 0100010100000010010 # add c, [a]
xx10000000000110111 0100010110000011010 # add d, [a]
xx10000000001000111 0100011000000100010 # add e, [a]
xx10000000001010111 0100011010000101010 # add bp, [a]
xx10000000001100111 0100011100000110010 # add sp, [a]
xx10000000100000111 0100010000010000010 # sub a, [a]
xx10000000100010111 0100010010010001010 # sub b, [a]
xx10000000100100111 0100010100010010010 # sub c, [a]
xx10000000100110111 0100010110010011010 # sub d, [a]
xx10000000101000111 0100011000010100010 # sub e, [a]
xx10000000101010111 0100011010010101010 # sub bp, [a]
xx10000000101100111 0100011100010110010 # sub sp, [a]
xx10000001000000111 0100010000100000010 # mul a, [a]
xx10000001000010111 0100010010100001010 # mul b, [a]
xx10000001000100111 0100010100100010010 # mul c, [a]
xx10000001000110111 0100010110100011010 # mul d, [a]
xx10000001001000111 0100011000100100010 # mul e, [a]
xx10000001001010111 0100011010100101010 # mul bp, [a]
xx10000001001100111 0100011100100110010 # mul sp, [a]
xx10000001100000111 0100010000110000010 # and a, [a]
xx10000001100010111 0100010010110001010 # and b, [a]
xx10000001100100111 0100010100110010010 # and c, [a]
xx10000001100110111 0100010110110011010 # and d, [a]
xx10000001101000111 0100011000110100010 # and e, [a]
xx10000001101010111 0100011010110101010 # and bp, [a]
xx10000001101100111 0100011100110110010 # and sp, [a]
xx10000010000000111 0100010001000000010 # or a, [a]
xx10000010000010111 0100010011000001010 # or b, [a]
xx10000010000100111 0100010101000010010 # or c, [a]
xx10000010000110111 0100010111000011010 # or d, [a]
xx10000010001000111 0100011001000100010 # or e, [a]
xx10000010001010111 0100011011000101010 # or bp, [a]
xx10000010001100111 0100011101000110010 # or sp, [a]
xx10000011000000111 0100010001100000010 # sub a, [a]
xx10000011000010111 0100010011100001010 # sub b, [a]
xx10000011000100111 0100010101100010010 # sub c, [a]
xx10000011000110111 0100010111100011010 # sub d, [a]
xx10000011001000111 0100011001100100010 # sub e, [a]
xx10000011001010111 0100011011100101010 # sub bp, [a]
xx10000011001100111 0100011101100110010 # sub sp, [a]
xx10000011100000111 0100010001110000010 # div a, [a]
xx10000011100010111 0100010011110001010 # div b, [a]
xx10000011100100111 0100010101110010010 # div c, [a]
xx10000011100110111 0100010111110011010 # div d, [a]
xx10000011101000111 0100011001110100010 # div e, [a]
xx10000011101010111 0100011011110101010 # div bp, [a]
xx10000011101100111 0100011101110110010 # div sp, [a]

# not
xx10000010100001111 0000010001010000000 # not a
xx10000010100011111 0000110001010001000 # not b
xx10000010100101111 0001010001010010000 # not c
xx10000010100111111 0001110001010011000 # not d
xx10000010101001111 0010010001010100000 # not e
xx10000010101011111 0010110001010101000 # not bp
xx10000010101101111 0011010001010110000 # not sp

# --- āfü[ā^ō]æŚ (mov, in, out) ---
# mov r1, r2
xx10000100000000000 0000000000000000000 # mov a, a
xx10000100000000001 0000100000000000000 # mov a, b
xx10000100000000010 0001000000000000000 # mov a, c
xx10000100000000011 0001100000000000000 # mov a, d
xx10000100000000100 0010000000000000000 # mov a, e
xx10000100000000101 0010100000000000000 # mov a, bp
xx10000100000000110 0011000000000000000 # mov a, sp
xx10000100000010000 0000000000000001000 # mov b, a
xx10000100000010001 0000100000000001000 # mov b, b
xx10000100000010010 0001000000000001000 # mov b, c
xx10000100000010011 0001100000000001000 # mov b, d
xx10000100000010100 0010000000000001000 # mov b, e
xx10000100000010101 0010100000000001000 # mov b, bp
xx10000100000010110 0011000000000001000 # mov b, sp
xx10000100000100000 0000000000000010000 # mov c, a
xx10000100000100001 0000100000000010000 # mov c, b
xx10000100000100010 0001000000000010000 # mov c, c
xx10000100000100011 0001100000000010000 # mov c, d
xx10000100000100100 0010000000000010000 # mov c, e
xx10000100000100101 0010100000000010000 # mov c, bp
xx10000100000100110 0011000000000010000 # mov c, sp
xx10000100000110000 0000000000000011000 # mov d, a
xx10000100000110001 0000100000000011000 # mov d, b
xx10000100000110010 0001000000000011000 # mov d, c
xx10000100000110011 0001100000000011000 # mov d, d
xx10000100000110100 0010000000000011000 # mov d, e
xx10000100000110101 0010100000000011000 # mov d, bp
xx10000100000110110 0011000000000011000 # mov d, sp
xx10000100001000000 0000000000000100000 # mov e, a
xx10000100001000001 0000100000000100000 # mov e, b
xx10000100001000010 0001000000000100000 # mov e, c
xx10000100001000011 0001100000000100000 # mov e, d
xx10000100001000100 0010000000000100000 # mov e, e
xx10000100001000101 0010100000000100000 # mov e, bp
xx10000100001000110 0011000000000100000 # mov e, sp
xx10000100001010000 0000000000000101000 # mov bp, a
xx10000100001010001 0000100000000101000 # mov bp, b
xx10000100001010010 0001000000000101000 # mov bp, c
xx10000100001010011 0001100000000101000 # mov bp, d
xx10000100001010100 0010000000000101000 # mov bp, e
xx10000100001010101 0010100000000101000 # mov bp, bp
xx10000100001010110 0011000000000101000 # mov bp, sp
xx10000100001100000 0000000000000110000 # mov sp, a
xx10000100001100001 0000100000000110000 # mov sp, b
xx10000100001100010 0001000000000110000 # mov sp, c
xx10000100001100011 0001100000000110000 # mov sp, d
xx10000100001100100 0010000000000110000 # mov sp, e
xx10000100001100101 0010100000000110000 # mov sp, bp
xx10000100001100110 0011000000000110000 # mov sp, sp

# mov r1, [a]
xx10000100000000111 0100000000000000010 # mov a, [a]
xx10000100000010111 0100000000000001010 # mov b, [a]
xx10000100000100111 0100000000000010010 # mov c, [a]
xx10000100000110111 0100000000000011010 # mov d, [a]
xx10000100001000111 0100000000000100010 # mov e, [a]
xx10000100001010111 0100000000000101010 # mov bp, [a]
xx10000100001100111 0100000000000110010 # mov sp, [a]

# mov r1, opd
xx10000100000001111 0011100000000000000 # mov a, opd
xx10000100000011111 0011100000000001000 # mov b, opd
xx10000100000101111 0011100000000010000 # mov c, opd
xx10000100000111111 0011100000000011000 # mov d, opd
xx10000100001001111 0011100000000100000 # mov e, opd
xx10000100001011111 0011100000000101000 # mov bp, opd
xx10000100001101111 0011100000000110000 # mov sp, opd

# mov r1, [opd]
xx10000100000000111 0100000000000000100 # mov a, [opd]
xx10000100000010111 0100000000000001100 # mov b, [opd]
xx10000100000100111 0100000000000010100 # mov c, [opd]
xx10000100000110111 0100000000000011100 # mov d, [opd]
xx10000100001000111 0100000000000100100 # mov e, [opd]
xx10000100001010111 0100000000000101100 # mov bp, [opd]
xx10000100001100111 0100000000000110100 # mov sp, [opd]

# in / out
xx10000100100001111 0100000000000000000 # in a
xx10000100100011111 0100000000000001000 # in b
xx10000100100101111 0100000000000010000 # in c
xx10000100100111111 0100000000000011000 # in d
xx10000100101001111 0100000000000100000 # in e
xx10000100101011111 0100000000000101000 # in bp
xx10000100101101111 0100000000000110000 # in sp
xx10000101000001111 0000000000001000000 # out a
xx10000101000011111 0000100000001000000 # out b
xx10000101000101111 0001000000001000000 # out c
xx10000101000111111 0001100000001000000 # out d
xx10000101001001111 0010000000001000000 # out e
xx10000101001011111 0010100000001000000 # out bp
xx10000101001101111 0011000000001000000 # out sp

# --- öõŖr ---
xx10001001000000000 0000010000011111000 # cmp a, a
xx10001001000000001 0000010010011111000 # cmp a, b
xx10001001000000010 0000010100011111000 # cmp a, c
xx10001001000000011 0000010110011111000 # cmp a, d
xx10001001000000100 0000011000011111000 # cmp a, e
xx10001001000000101 0000011010011111000 # cmp a, bp
xx10001001000000110 0000011100011111000 # cmp a, sp
xx10001001000010000 0000110000011111000 # cmp b, a
xx10001001000010001 0000110010011111000 # cmp b, b
xx10001001000010010 0000110100011111000 # cmp b, c
xx10001001000010011 0000110110011111000 # cmp b, d
xx10001001000010100 0000111000011111000 # cmp b, e
xx10001001000010101 0000111010011111000 # cmp b, bp
xx10001001000010110 0000111100011111000 # cmp b, sp
xx10001001000100000 0001010000011111000 # cmp c, a
xx10001001000100001 0001010010011111000 # cmp c, b
xx10001001000100010 0001010100011111000 # cmp c, c
xx10001001000100011 0001010110011111000 # cmp c, d
xx10001001000100100 0001011000011111000 # cmp c, e
xx10001001000100101 0001011010011111000 # cmp c, bp
xx10001001000100110 0001011100011111000 # cmp c, sp
xx10001001000110000 0001110000011111000 # cmp d, a
xx10001001000110001 0001110010011111000 # cmp d, b
xx10001001000110010 0001110100011111000 # cmp d, c
xx10001001000110011 0001110110011111000 # cmp d, d
xx10001001000110100 0001111000011111000 # cmp d, e
xx10001001000110101 0001111010011111000 # cmp d, bp
xx10001001000110110 0001111100011111000 # cmp d, sp
xx10001001001000000 0010010000011111000 # cmp e, a
xx10001001001000001 0010010010011111000 # cmp e, b
xx10001001001000010 0010010100011111000 # cmp e, c
xx10001001001000011 0010010110011111000 # cmp e, d
xx10001001001000100 0010011000011111000 # cmp e, e
xx10001001001000101 0010011010011111000 # cmp e, bp
xx10001001001000110 0010011100011111000 # cmp e, sp
xx10001001001010000 0010110000011111000 # cmp bp, a
xx10001001001010001 0010110010011111000 # cmp bp, b
xx10001001001010010 0010110100011111000 # cmp bp, c
xx10001001001010011 0010110110011111000 # cmp bp, d
xx10001001001010100 0010111000011111000 # cmp bp, e
xx10001001001010101 0010111010011111000 # cmp bp, bp
xx10001001001010110 0010111100011111000 # cmp bp, sp
xx10001001001100000 0011010000011111000 # cmp sp, a
xx10001001001100001 0011010010011111000 # cmp sp, b
xx10001001001100010 0011010100011111000 # cmp sp, c
xx10001001001100011 0011010110011111000 # cmp sp, d
xx10001001001100100 0011011000011111000 # cmp sp, e
xx10001001001100101 0011011010011111000 # cmp sp, bp
xx10001001001100110 0011011100011111000 # cmp sp, sp
xx10001001000001111 0000011110011111000 # cmp a, opd
xx10001001000011111 0000111110011111000 # cmp b, opd
xx10001001000101111 0001011110011111000 # cmp c, opd
xx10001001000111111 0001111110011111000 # cmp d, opd
xx10001001001001111 0010011110011111000 # cmp e, opd
xx10001001001011111 0010111110011111000 # cmp bp, opd
xx10001001001101111 0011011110011111000 # cmp sp, opd
